headline: If You Had Invested $1,000 in Clorox a Decade Ago: A Prospective Dividend King’s Long-Term Payoff
summary: A Decade of Dividends, a Stock That Stood Still Clorox (NYSE: CLX) spent the past 10 years doing what consumer staples are supposed to do: pay reliably, raise dividends annually, and grind through cycles. The pandemic briefly turned cleaning brands into pantry essentials, sending shares above prior highs. Then came margin compression, a 2023 cyberattack, ... If You Had Invested $1,000 in Clorox a Decade Ago: A Prospective Dividend King’s Long-Term Payoff

headline: Contrarian Take: This High-Yield Dividend Stock Is a Buy in May Despite Falling to an 11-Year Low
summary: With a 5.7% yield, Clorox could help power value investors' passive income.
